name: land-explorer
description: Land Explorer monorepo: front-end, back-end and property-boundaries-service as npm workspaces.

scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/back-end --if-present && npm run build -w apps/property-boundaries-service --if-present

comments.build: front-end is excluded from the root build: its git-pinned @mapbox/mapbox-gl-draw only installs correctly under yarn. Build it with `yarn build` in apps/front-end (as CI does) until the yarn->npm cutover.
comments.overrides: Pin transitive/dev versions to what the source repos' own lockfiles used, so workspace hoisting reproduces each app's original build. Revisit at cutover.
